feed.title: SAP Community - SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
feed.subtitle: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: reporting on successfactor business rules and the respective assignments - workflow / HRIS element
entry.content:
hi 

I am doing a review of a clients business rules, workflows &  alerts etc. I need to be able to report on the workflow config and trace back to which business rule triggers the workflow. When I look under Configure business rules, there are some rules that are not assigned ( which i would have assumed that it means that they are not in use even though they are not end dated) , however when i look in Business Configuration and look at the HRIS element, I can see that the Business rule is assigned and has a "Yes" under enabled . I understand that some business rules may not be associated with a workflow. But surely if the business rule is associated with an HRIS element or something else, I should be able to see an assignment green tick under the Configure business rules? Is this an incorrect assumption ? How then do i accuratelyy report on the active and in use business rules

I did pull an export from Configure business rules, and a significant number came back with the comment that no assignment details could be found ( maybe because the rules were created under the basic rule sceanario). Not really sure.

entry.title: SuccessFactors Sync SF - Microsoft Entra - Multiple Employment/Contingent
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

we have set up an integration between Successfactors and Microsoft Entra. The sync and writeback are also working for us so far. However, we are having problems with employees with multiple employment, employees who change from a fixed-term to a permanent contract and with contingent workers.

  • In the case of multiple employees, integration “rolls the dice” as to which employment is taken. As a result, it regularly happens that the inactive employment is synced and the account is deactivated in AD.
  • As soon as an employee's termination is deleted due to a permanent contract, the AD receives the value NULL for the expiration date. The value NULL does not overwrite the old value in the AD and must therefore be deleted manually.
  • In the case of contingent workers, we have no termiantion and therefore no termination date. The Work Order End Date can be used as a replacement.

Has anyone already gained experience with the integration and solved these challenges (via one application)? We would be very happy to hear from you.

Best regards
Sascha Grünner

entry.title: Audit for identify login method changes (Employee Central - profile)
entry.content:
Dear experts,

We have a case where the login method of the user were changed from SSO to PWD on the Employee Central profile. 

Is there a possibility to identify who and when the method got changed?

Thank you in advance for your guidance,

Eli

entry.title: Impacts on change Event Reasons during a transfer
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 

I need to change an event from Transfer to Data Change type on my customer, but some employees have a current Transfer in progress.

What type of impacts can I expect if I change this event reason?

Another question is: the current starts of a temporary transfer is registered by a Transfer event reason, end the end of this mobility needs to be a Data Change, does you see any impact on this? The system will support this change? Or maybe I will have a pending Transfer change for that employees?

 

Thanks in advance!

JC

entry.title: CAN you use Joule for functional testing ?
entry.content: I’m wondering if some successfactors Customer have tried to use joule as IA Test agent to test end to end scénarios like hiring on a position created by joule ? I would be interessted to know the gain compared to other RPA tools ?

entry.title: S4 HANA setting for SF Onboarding 2.0 (mini-EC) Integration
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

One of our customers is implementing Onboarding 2.0. They do not have Employee Central and their HRIS system is S/4 HANA system. They were on 1.0 earlier and are now moving to 2.0 due to the upcoming product deprecation announced by SAP.

I understand that integration between Onboarding 2.0 (mini-EC) and S/4 HANA requires a custom integration, but there is some confusion on what configuration settings are required at S/4 side. I know that we need to switch-off Talent Hybrid integration for Employee Data at S/4 first, but need some help with the next steps.

1. Is it possible to have a staging table at S/4 HANA to display onboarding data from SuccessFactors and let HRs manually hire the New Hires to the system (Similar to Onboarding 1.0 integration to S/4)?

or

2. Automated hiring using webservices is the only option and later, HR can key in the tax details and other details manually?

Which among the 2 is the best option? Let me know if there are any other options for integration. Please let me know if there are any good documentation on this topic.

Thanks and Regards

Blessy Akutkar

SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding SAP S/4HANA  HCM (Human Capital Management) SAP Cloud for Customer integration with SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: I want time off days previous year time account balance to be shown on time off request screen
entry.content: I want time off days previous year time account balance to be shown on time off request screen

entry.title: Effective Date when Department was made inactive
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Can we pull Effective date when department was made inactive in the system, using business rule?

I am trying to pull effective date using look up function, but it returns null (as per my understanding, look up function works for active records only).

Note: End date field has been enabled in Department.

entry.title: 1H 2025 Product Release: Add a Note, View Notes, etc in Full Profile?
entry.content: With the new Full Profile, where do Managers and Employees view their Notes that were added using "Add a Note to..."? These are used by our organization in many departments.  When is this planned to be included in the Full Profile?  This is a mandatory feature in our organization.

entry.title: Different Logo/Branding across SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi Community,

We will be having a sister company come onto our Successfactors instance and i am trying to understand if/where i can have separate branding. Was hoping on feedback for:

  • Can we have a different logo on the instance home page?
  • Can we have different banners on the instance home page?
  • Can we have a different logo on the communication emails?
  • Does RCM allow for advertising in different branding?

Thank you! SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central

entry.title: Notification to HR when Onboardee is in MPH
entry.content:
Hi,

Is it possible to send a notification to HR once onboardee have filled the onboarding step?
After this the onboardee will end up in MPH, but HR is not notified. Is it possible to send a notification or an email? 

Thanks.

entry.title: Report No Show in Integration Center
entry.content:
Hello Experts,
I hope that all of you are doing good.
We have an Integration Center job to send Terminated employee data and filter is on "Employment End Date" to prevent sending duplicate Terminated records daily (delta records only).

As per requirement, we need to send "Reported No Show" records also and the same ""No Show" records should not be sent daily (delta records only). Kindly assist to pull "Reported No Show" (delta records only).

It is important to note that the IC Job does not provide an option for "No-Show Date" similar to the "Employment End Date."

Thanks and Regards,
RG

entry.title: Cannot connect to a service - Build code to SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hello, I am developing an extension in SAP Build Code, and when trying to add a SSFF service, it does not appear as available.

The BTP Trial account has already been registered in the SSFF product, and the destination has been created.

 

As you mension in the help is not available for Full-Stack Application Using Productivity Tools dev space.

 

I wonder to know if there is another way to add a SSFF Service in Sap build code in a Full-Stack Application project using Productivity Tools dev space.

Has anyone else experienced the same issue? Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Licences for Alumni?
entry.content: In the 1H 2025 release there is a lot of functionality available for alumni, are there licence requirements to be able to use this?

entry.title: Create recurring pay component of same type using business rules
entry.content:
Hi

  I have a requirement to create multiple non recurring payment ie for every year till they are in a particular location. The years can be more than 10 also, so I believe it is not recommended to write the logic in Business rule. So, is there a way to achieve it.

Thanks

Sri

entry.title: Option to hide "Allow employees to enter an introductory text"
entry.content: My customer is testing the new People Profile and would like to hide the option for employees to enter an introductory text.  Is this possible?  They are concerned about the inability to efficiently monitor this field to ensure an employee does not write anything offensive or inappropriate.

entry.title: Automatic welcome mail to new hires
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

we are currently doing a new implementation of SuccessFactors Recruiting. We would like to automatically trigger a welcome email after the candidate is hired with some basic information about the company and the first day.

I am running into multiple problems, e.g. it seems regular mails triggered from SuccessFactors do not support (multiple) attachments. Ideally we'd like a welcome mail with attachements to be sent out 30 days before the Hire Date. Does anyone know how we could automate this?

I've been thinking about a regular recruiting template and connecting that with a hired status, but then I have no influence on the trigger. 

Thank you and best regards

Jule

entry.title: New people manager report
entry.content: Hello, We are looking to report in SF EC people who have recently become people managers. We want to be careful to not include people whose position is a higher level position to only vacant roles. We want to be able to run this report monthly to identify new managers for training, communications, etc. This should include new hires that start out as people managers from the beginning (easier) as well as people who are promoted into manager roles (harder). Having trouble figuring out how to do this - is there some effective-dated field or report that we can use for this? Or how are other people tracking manager changes? Thank you.

entry.title: Can we send an email update to Managers when the employee is hired from Employee Central Module ?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Is there any feasibility Can we send an email update to Managers when the employee is hired from Employee Central Module?

Please comment

entry.title: Can we send an email update to Managers when the employee is hired from Employee Central Module ?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Is there any feasibility Can we send an email update to Managers when the employee is hired from Employee Central Module?

Please comment
